title: Video by 4vpowerspeed
description:
Fun warm up. Athletes are forced to stabilize through their core, control their body, and stay balanced under pressure… all while trying to win.

30 seconds
1 vs 1
Don’t lose your cone.

You’d be surprised how quickly this exposes balance and coordination.

Fun matters. Competition matters.

Save this and try it with your athletes.

SAVE | SHARE | FOLLOW @4vpowerspeed
